approaches.title: Two-Pass Constraint Propagation
approaches.summary: Propagate height constraints forward and backward to determine feasible heights at each position, then compute the maximum height between adjacent constraints.

revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 1840: had a peek at hints
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation with separate forward and backward passes, then computing max between adjacent constraints.
Optimized by merging the backward pass into the forward pass and computing max during the same iteration.
